# Aryan Panwar — Product Evidence Book

> Aryan Panwar is an aspiring Product Manager with a builder background — ECE graduate from MIET Meerut (2026) who ships AI products and writes about product tradeoffs, AI feature design, and PM frameworks. He has built FitWardrobe (on-device AI wardrobe stylist), Mithivoices (open-source real-time voice AI stack), SEO-GEO Optimizer (npm package for AI search visibility), and an AI-First CRM for healthcare field reps.

## About

- [About Aryan Panwar](https://aryanpanwar.in/about): Values, background, and why product management over engineering.
- [Career Journey](https://aryanpanwar.in/journey): Timeline from embedded hardware (robot arm, wireless EV charging) to AI product development.

## Case Studies

- [FitWardrobe](https://aryanpanwar.in/case-studies/fitwardrobe): AI wardrobe stylist — reframed the core job using JTBD, shipped on-device vision (TFLite) to cut outfit selection to under 30 seconds. Chose privacy and latency over cloud capability.
- [Mithivoices](https://aryanpanwar.in/case-studies/mithivoices): Open-source real-time voice AI stack — prioritized a 40+ module OSS backlog with RICE against a hard 500ms E2E latency ceiling.
- [SEO-GEO Optimizer](https://aryanpanwar.in/case-studies/seo-geo-optimizer): npm package that auto-generates structured data, llms.txt, and answer-first content to make sites legible to AI answer engines like Perplexity and ChatGPT.
- [AI-First CRM (HCP)](https://aryanpanwar.in/case-studies/ai-first-crm-hcp): Field-rep CRM for healthcare — ran 8 behavioral discovery interviews, chose draft-and-confirm over autonomy to maintain 85%+ acceptance rate.
- [Credex Spend Audit](https://aryanpanwar.in/case-studies/credex-spend-audit): North-star metric "Dollars of Verified Savings Surfaced" with counter-metrics (false-positive rate, savings rejection rate) to prevent Goodhart's Law.

## Product Thinking

- [JTBD applied to FitWardrobe](https://aryanpanwar.in/thinking/jtbd-fitwardrobe): How Jobs-to-be-Done reframed the product from "another closet app" to a morning ritual, including killing a shopping tab that was already prototyped.
- [RICE applied to Mithivoices](https://aryanpanwar.in/thinking/rice-mithivoices): Scoring an OSS backlog of 40+ modules by % of new contributors who hit each module within a week.
- [Opportunity Trees for SEO-GEO Optimizer](https://aryanpanwar.in/thinking/opportunity-tree-seo-geo): Mapping the AI-search space into structured opportunities before writing a single line of code.
- [North-star metrics for Credex](https://aryanpanwar.in/thinking/north-star-credex): Choosing a metric that only moves when the customer actually wins, and the counter-metrics that keep it honest.
- [Discovery interviews for AI-First CRM](https://aryanpanwar.in/thinking/discovery-hcp-crm): How to run problem-space interviews with field reps without leading the witness.
- [AI product tradeoffs](https://aryanpanwar.in/thinking/ai-tradeoffs): On-device vs cloud, eval design, latency vs quality — real decisions made across FitWardrobe, Mithivoices, and HCP CRM with written reversion triggers.

## Writing

- [What Building FitWardrobe Taught Me About Product Discovery](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/fitwardrobe-product-discovery): Seven un-facilitated interviews changed the roadmap more than three weeks of building.
- [I Stopped Thinking Like an Engineer](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/stopped-thinking-like-engineer): How the mental shift from shipping code to owning outcomes changed every decision I make.
- [How to Prioritize Product Features Before Writing a PRD](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/prioritize-features-before-prd): A practical pre-PRD prioritization framework.
- [Why Every Product Needs Success Metrics Before Features](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/success-metrics-before-features): North-star selection methodology to avoid building metrics that game themselves.
- [The Features I Removed That Made FitWardrobe Better](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/features-removed-fitwardrobe): On the discipline of subtraction in product development.
- [Local AI vs Cloud AI: Decisions Behind FitWardrobe](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/local-vs-cloud-ai-fitwardrobe): Concrete decision log for the on-device vs cloud tradeoff with reversion triggers.
- [Building AI Features Users Actually Trust](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/building-ai-features-users-trust): How to design AI interactions that feel reliable rather than magical.
- [From Engineering Projects to Product Thinking](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/engineering-to-product-thinking): The frameworks and mindset shifts that bridged the gap.
- [My Product Thinking Toolkit](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/product-thinking-toolkit): The PM frameworks I reach for most and how I apply them.
- [If I Started FitWardrobe Again Today](https://aryanpanwar.in/writing/if-i-started-fitwardrobe-again): What I would do differently knowing what I know now.

## Optional

- [Portfolio Content (llms-full.txt)](https://aryanpanwar.in/llms-full.txt): A concatenated markdown dump of the Case Studies, Product Thinking, and Writing sections for deep context ingestion.
